CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, data VARCHAR(255), more_data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, more_data) VALUES (1, 'Hello', 'World');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, more_data) VALUES (2, 'Foo', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, more_data) VALUES (3, '', 'Bar');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, more_data) VALUES (4, 'Baz', '');
SELECT xte_nodebld_acc(data, more_data) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xte_nodebld_acc(data, more_data, 'Extra') FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT xte_nodebld_acc(data, more_data, 'Data1', 'Data2') FROM test_table WHERE id = 3;
SELECT xte_nodebld_acc('Initial', more_data) FROM test_table WHERE id = 4;
SELECT xte_nodebld_acc(data) FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT xte_nodebld_acc(data, more_data) AS result FROM (SELECT data, more_data FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2)) AS subquery;
SELECT xte_nodebld_acc('Item1', 'Item2', (SELECT data FROM test_table WHERE id = 1), 'Item3') AS combined_result;
WITH temp AS (SELECT data FROM test_table WHERE more_data IS NOT NULL) SELECT xte_nodebld_acc('Start', data) FROM temp;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT xte_nodebld_acc(data, more_data) FROM test_table) AS acc_result;
SELECT xte_nodebld_acc(NULL, more_data) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
